Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Deposition Of X-Complainant Melinda Norrell
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE:
Jeffrey Whitelaw, Esq., for Cross-defendant and moving party: Van Ru Credit Corporation

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling is modified. Cross-defendant Van Ru Credit Corporation's motion to compel the deposition of Melinda Norrell is Granted. Deposition to be completed by 9/24/07. Sanctions of $440 payable withing 30 days of notice of order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
